description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.9.4 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a single stage named build and a job called build that runs in this stage. In the before_script step run apt-get update -y && apt-get install -y zip, then in the script step execute npm install followed by npm run package. Publish the files build/kvasir.zip and build/kvasir.xpi as build artifacts.
